setup.title: Configure Point of Sale
setup.subtitle: Review POS operating rules, payment settlement accounts, and cash control accounts before enabling the module.
setup.defaultsApplied: POS defaults applied. Review and finish setup when ready.
setup.directSalesWarning: Allowing POS direct sales enables real posted Sales Invoices from the cashier screen. Keep it off until payment methods, cash drawer accounts, and cashier permissions are ready.

validation.settlementAccount: Every enabled payment method must have a settlement account.

confirm.title: Finish POS setup?
confirm.body: This will save these POS settings and mark the POS module as initialized for this company.

setup.loadFailed: Failed to load existing POS settings.

home.title: Point of Sale
home.subtitle: Cashier terminal. Opens to the register the current user is signed in on.
home.comingSoon: Cashier screen lands in Phase 247c. Configure registers and settings in the meantime.

managerOverride.title: Manager approval
managerOverride.voidHelp: Capture manager approval if the cashier role requires approval for line voids.
managerOverride.saleHelp: Capture approval before completing a sale with restricted discounts, price, tax, or void overrides.
managerOverride.returnHelp: Capture manager approval if the cashier role requires approval for returns or exchanges.

terminal.cartEmpty: Cart is empty. Add items from the left.
terminal.tenderMismatch: Tendered total does not match grand total.
terminal.needOpenShift: No open shift for this register.
terminal.priceRequired: Set a sale price for this item before selling it in POS.
terminal.needOpenShiftHelp: Open a POS shift before selling.
terminal.searchPrompt: Scan or search to add products
terminal.searchPromptHelp: Tap a product to add it to the order. Press Enter to add the top match.
terminal.cartEmptyHelp: Add items from the product list.
terminal.voidAllMessage: This marks all current sale lines as voided and keeps an audit trail.
terminal.voidLineMessage: This marks the selected line as voided and keeps an audit trail.
terminal.needCustomerForCredit: Credit sale requires a selected customer.
terminal.creditSaleNeedsApproval: Manager approval is required for deferred payment.

settings.title: POS Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure registers, payment methods, and the governance gate for direct sales.
settings.requireOpenShift: Require an open shift to sell
settings.allowPosDirectSalesHelp: When enabled, the backend creates a form-scoped governance rule allowing the "direct" persona for formType "pos_sale" so cashiers can post direct Sales Invoices. Disabling it removes the rule.
settings.creditSaleManagerOverride: Require Manager Override for Credit Sales
settings.allowCreditSalesHelp: When enabled, cashiers can complete a sale without payment by billing it to the selected customer's AR account. Walk-in customers cannot be used for credit sales.
settings.walkInCustomerHelp: Default customer for receipts with no named party. Required when completing a sale.
settings.cashRoundingHelp: V1 reserves this field; "none" is applied at the till.
settings.negativeStockPolicyHelp: Block keeps the till from overselling even when the company allows negative stock for back-office sales. Allow defers to the company inventory setting.

negativeStock.block: Block — never sell below zero stock
negativeStock.allow: Allow — defer to company inventory setting

settings.cashOverHelp: Credit account for over-counts at shift close.
settings.cashShortHelp: Debit account for short-counts at shift close. Required to close a shift that has a non-zero over/short.

confirmAllowDirect.title: Toggle POS direct sales?
confirmAllowDirect.body: This will change whether direct cash sales are allowed from the POS terminal.

settings.defaultRevenueAccountHelp: Fallback revenue account for POS sales when an item (and its category) has none. Resolution order at the till: item → item category → this default.

belowCost.title: Below-cost selling policy
belowCost.subtitle: Company-wide rule for selling at or below cost. Shared with Sales — changing it here changes it everywhere.
belowCost.mode: When a line is below cost
belowCost.requireApproval: Require approval — block until a manager approves
belowCost.allowOverride: Allow manager override (off = absolute block; even an approved override cannot pass)
belowCost.minMarginHelp: Optional. A line below this margin is treated like a below-cost line. Leave blank to only guard against selling below cost.

registers.title: POS Registers
registers.subtitle: Tills. Each register is tied to a warehouse and a cash-drawer account.
registers.empty: No registers yet. Create one to start selling.
registers.requiredFields: Code, name, warehouse, and cash-drawer account are required.
registers.branchHelp: Free-text branch id. The ERP has no first-class Branch entity yet.
registers.priceListHelp: Terminal-specific price-list selection. Leave blank to use normal POS pricing.
registers.hardwareHelp: Receipt printer, cash drawer, scanner, and customer display mapping.
registers.noUsersLoaded: No company users loaded. Leave blank to allow all cashiers.
registers.allowedCashiersHelp: When no users are selected, any cashier with POS access can open a shift on this register.
registers.cashDrawerHelp: Used for all CASH sales, cash refunds, cash movements, and over/short close entries for this register.
registers.nonCashSettlementHelp: Used when this register accepts this non-cash method. Leave blank only if the method is not used at this register.

shortcuts.title: Shortcut layout
shortcuts.help: Choose the product shortcut layout this register should use. Leave blank to use the company default.
shortcuts.dialogSubtitle: Manage the product shortcut layout used by this register.

shift.title: POS Shift
shift.noOpen: No open shift. Open one to start selling.

return.title: Process return
return.noLines: Pick at least one line to return.
return.needOpenShift: No open shift for this register.
return.confirmBody: This posts a sales return, reverses revenue/tax, restocks inventory (per policy), and (for CASH) reduces the shift drawer. Continue?

shortcuts.title: POS Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Build terminal groups and bulk-assign items to each group.
shortcuts.bulkHint: Select many items, then add them to this group.
shortcuts.searchItems: Search item code, name, or barcode
shortcuts.label: Label
shortcuts.ready: This layout is active and will be used by the POS terminal.
shortcuts.customItemNotImplemented: Custom item entry is not available yet.

z.title: Z Report (by shift)
z.subtitle: Finalized close summary for a closed POS shift.

payments.title: Payment Methods
payments.subtitle: Receipts and amounts per POS payment method.

cashier.title: Cashier Sales
cashier.subtitle: Totals per cashier (uid) for the period.

receipts.title: Receipt History
receipts.subtitle: All POS receipts in the period, with the linked SI number.

cancelledReceipts.title: Cancelled Receipts
cancelledReceipts.subtitle: Posted POS receipts marked voided after reversal through the return path.

overrideAudit.title: Override Audit
overrideAudit.subtitle: Voids, manual discounts, price overrides, and tax overrides for manager review.

reprintAudit.title: Reprint Audit
reprintAudit.subtitle: Receipt reprint events for duplicate-copy control.

topSellingItems.title: Top Selling Items
topSellingItems.subtitle: Gross sold quantity and amount from completed POS receipts.

exchange.enterItem: Search and select a replacement item.
exchange.noReturnLines: Select at least one return line.
exchange.noReplacementLines: Add at least one replacement line.
exchange.searchPlaceholder: Search item code, name, or barcode
exchange.confirmBody: This posts a POS return and a replacement POS sale under one exchange reference. Continue?
